title: Shared inbox + per-actor inbox + HTTP signature verification
description: Implement the ActivityPub inbox endpoints: shared inbox at /inbox and per-actor inbox at /users/:username/inbox. All inbound activities must have their HTTP signatures verified before processing. Use the activitypub-federation crate for signature verification. Fetch the sender's public key from remote_accounts (or resolve if unknown). Reject activities with invalid signatures with 401.
design: Use activitypub-federation crate's inbox extraction. Verify signature by fetching keyId URL, parsing actor document, extracting publicKey.publicKeyPem. Cache in remote_accounts. On signature failure: re-fetch actor (key may have rotated), retry once, then 401. Parse to/cc to determine which local actors are targeted.
acceptance_criteria: Inbound POST to /inbox with valid HTTP signature is accepted; invalid signature returns 401; Pleroma Content-Type with charset parameter is accepted; activities arrive in correct JSON structure; shared inbox correctly routes to local actors via to/cc fields
